nodes.context: Criminal group that took over streets of Michoacán from previously dominant groups.
Local criminal gang created to oust Los Zetas and take back control of Michoacán.
Criminal group formed by former members of La Familia Michoacana after its disintegration.
Drug cartel created by former Autodefensas leader Nicolás Sierra Santana.
Cartel that has ties and rivalry with Los Viagras.
Cartel suspected to have members in self-defense groups in Tamaulipas.

edges.evidence_quote: When the criminal groups known as Los Zetas took over the streets of Michoacán from the previously dominant criminal groups in this state, a local criminal gang La Familia Michoacana was created to oust them and to take back control of the area.
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana was created to oust Los Zetas from Michoacán.

edges.evidence_quote: When power vacuum occurred La Familia Michoacana fell into infighting and disintegrated, its former members created the Knights Templar Cartel.
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel was created by former members of La Familia Michoacana after its disintegration.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras (which is now known to have ties and rivalry with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel).
edges.context: Los Viagras has both ties and rivalry with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
